title: Customizable Email Preference Center

posts.author: ofuks001 (Omara Fuks)
posts.cookedHtml:
This request is about to add a customizable email preference center for marketing and mass email blasts sent from the platform.

Currently, unsubscribing from these emails offers only a full opt-out. We need a feature where, upon clicking “unsubscribe,” recipients are presented with checkboxes to select specific email categories they wish to receive (e.g., “Newsletters,” “Promotions,” “Product Updates”), rather than simply unsubscribing from everything.

Implementing this would enhance compliance with privacy regulations, reduce full unsubscribes, improve recipient experience by offering control over their inbox, and streamline marketing workflows by reducing reliance on external tools solely for preference management.
